description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and set the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay. In the build stage add a build job that runs the global before_script (apk add --update make git and docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY), then executes make latencyAt-rootfs.tar followed by make docker-builder-push, and publishes latencyAt-rootfs.tar as an artifact. In the docker-image stage add a docker-image job that runs make docker-push. In the test stage add a unit-tests job that starts a postgres container with docker run -d --name postgres postgres, waits for readiness using a while loop with docker run --rm --link postgres:pg postgres:9.5 pg_isready -U postgres -h pg; do sleep 1; done, creates the citext extension via docker exec postgres psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS citext;' postgres, and finally runs the built image with docker run -e DB_URL=postgres://postgres@postgres/postgres?sslmode=disable -e STRIPE_KEY=$STRIPE_KEY --link postgres:postgres --cap-add IPC_LOCK --cap-add SYS_RESOURCE $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$(echo $CI_COMMIT_SHA | cut -c1-8)-builder make test.
